creator: tanawts@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 247453
Initial Patch for adding rubygem-ruby-mysql 4.1.0

Initial patch to add tmtm's supported rubygem-ruby-mysql connector to FreeBSD. 
The databases/rubygem-mysql port has been out of date and unsupported since 2015

rubygem-ruby-mysql is a MySQL client library.
It is written entirely in Ruby.
Therefore libmysqlclient is not required and no compilation is required during installation.
